_comment: Example HolisticEvaluationResult returned by evaluation_service.run_holistic_evaluation(). All scores are 0-100 integers. Demonstrates a 'Borderline' candidate case.
strengths: Good communication skills and clear verbal articulation
Demonstrated awareness of team dynamics and collaboration
Showed genuine enthusiasm for the role and company mission
weaknesses: Technical answers lacked depth and specific examples
Occasional hesitation when discussing past achievements
Inconsistent use of structured reasoning (STAR) across answers
final_summary: The candidate shows solid interpersonal and communication skills but fell short on technical depth for a senior-level position. Their behavioural answers were structured and relevant, but technical responses revealed gaps in system design knowledge. Recommend a technical screening call focused on distributed systems and scalability before making a final hiring decision.
